agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define ammo types, max carry, sources, consumption per shot, and UI warnings at low ammo.
implementation_checklist: Decrement on fire
Block fire at zero with feedback
Sync ammo count to HUD and inventory
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Ranged weapons consume ammo from inventory; tune carry caps, craft sources, and fallback melee.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Ammo tension works when melee remains viable so players are never hard-stuck at zero.
when_to_avoid: When tracking ammo would add UI noise without meaningful decisions
design_guidance.when_to_use: When ranged attacks require consumable or limited ammunition.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Inventory, crafting, shop restocks, combat HUD.

parameter_knobs.effect: Upper bound or capacity for ammo.

parameter_knobs.name: gain_rate

variables.player_focus: Craft or buy ammo before encounters.
variables.shared_rationale: Ranged weapons consume arrows and bombs from inventory.
variables.summary: Consumable ammunition for ranged weapons.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define phase HP thresholds, attack set per phase, and transition feedback.

Fire phase transition event
Swap boss behavior table

design_guidance.where_to_use: Boss HP bar segments, phase transition scripts.

Reset on break condition

Decrement charge and apply recovery

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Specify soul earn, drop location on death, recovery rules, and loss on second death.
implementation_checklist: Track soul balance
Spawn pickup at death
Clear on recovery or second death
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Souls represent XP and currency at risk on death; document drop, recovery, and loss on second death.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Recovery loop must be challenging but fair—don't place stain in unreachable pits.
when_to_avoid: When tracking souls would add UI noise without meaningful decisions
design_guidance.when_to_use: When death drops accumulated XP/currency at the death site for recovery risk.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Soulslike death stains, bloodstains, runaway currency.

variables.player_focus: Spend before dying or recover shade pile.
variables.shared_rationale: Run-scoped souls fund shade recovery and vendor purchases in roguelikes.
variables.summary: Run-scoped currency earned from combat, spent at vendors.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Specify stamina max, costs for sprint/dodge/attack, regen delay, and UI feedback when depleted.
implementation_checklist: Drain on gated actions
Block actions at zero
Regen after delay with HUD update
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Stamina gates repeated actions; document max pool, per-action cost, regen rate, and exhaustion penalty.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Regen delay after exertion prevents infinite kiting; tune per action cost.
when_to_avoid: When tracking stamina would add UI noise without meaningful decisions
design_guidance.when_to_use: When sustained sprint, climb, dodge, or attack chains need pacing.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Combat stamina bar, climb grip meter, exploration sprint.

variables.shared_rationale: Climb and sprint economy gates vertical exploration.
variables.summary: Short-term exertion meter for sprint, dodge, or climb.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List tasks, completion time, progress increment, win threshold, and what UI exposes to each role.
implementation_checklist: Increment on task completion
Check win at threshold
Mirror progress to HUD and map overlay
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Task progress tracks completed crew objectives toward win; tune task count, duration, and visibility to impostors.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Make progress visible to all roles where asymmetric information is part of the design.
when_to_avoid: When tracking task progress would add UI noise without meaningful decisions
design_guidance.when_to_use: When crew or team objectives must complete before time or elimination ends the match.
design_guidance.where_to_use: HUD progress bar, meeting discussion, win condition checks.

variables.player_focus: Complete tasks before elimination quota.
variables.shared_rationale: Crew win condition visible to both teams.
variables.summary: Fraction of crew objectives completed.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define energy per weapon, refill pickups, consumption per use, and pause-menu display.
implementation_checklist: Track array of per-weapon energy
Decrement on special fire
Refill from stage pickups
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Weapon energy is per-weapon ammo for specials; document caps, refill sources, and HUD per weapon.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Per-weapon pools encourage routing—players cannot spam one solution for every encounter.
when_to_avoid: When tracking weapon energy would add UI noise without meaningful decisions
design_guidance.when_to_use: When each special weapon has its own limited use pool distinct from shared mana.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Weapon select UI, boss fights, stage pickups.

variables.name: Weapon Energy

parameter_knobs.effect: Upper bound or capacity for weapon energy.
parameter_knobs.name: max_value

parameter_knobs.effect: How quickly weapon energy refills or increments.
parameter_knobs.name: gain_rate

variables.player_focus: Match weapon to boss weakness without starving others.
variables.shared_rationale: Distinct ammo per boss weapon creates routing puzzles.
variables.summary: Ammo pool for special weapons distinct from health.
